commands.review_summary:
The PR adds a `model.reasoning === false` check in OpenAI-compatible chat-completions streaming to delete `delta.reasoning_content` before processing stream deltas.

PR surface: Source +4. Total +4 across 1 file.

Reproducibility: yes. source inspection gives a high-confidence fixture path: a current-main OpenAI-compatible chunk with `model.reasoning: false` and `delta.reasoning_content` still becomes a `thinking_delta`. I did not run a live model reproduction.
commands.review_followup: - [P1] The PR needs contributor after-fix proof and code changes for the blocking stream findings before normal maintainer review can continue.

target.title: fix(llm): filter out reasoning_content from streaming output when reasoning is disabled
target.body: ## Real behavior proof **问题描述**： 在 OpenClaw 中配置 `reasoning: false` 后，某些模型（如 MiMo）仍然在流式响应中返回 `reasoning_content` 字段，导致思考过程泄漏到最终输出中。 **环境信息**： - OpenClaw 版本：[你测试的版本或 commit] - 操作系统：[Ubuntu 22.04 / 你的系统] - 测试模型：MiMo / Qwen（任意能复现问题的模型） **修复前**： 执行以下请求： ```bash curl -X POST http://localhost:38817/v1/chat/completions \ -H "Content-Type: application/json" \ -d '{"model":"qwen3","messages":[{"role":"user","content":"hi"}],"stream":true}' 证据： （ ） 修复方式： 在 src/agents/openai-transport-stream.ts 中，发送响应给客户端之前，增加了一层过滤：当 model.reasoning === false 时，删除 delta.reasoning_content 字段。不修改其他任何内部逻辑。 改动范围： · 文件：src/agents/openai-transport-stream.ts · 改动：+4 行
target.author: zz327455573
